name: 法玛斯 | 对比涂装
descriptionEn: A cheap option for cash-strapped players, the FAMAS effectively fills the niche between more expensive rifles and the less-effective SMGs. It has been spray-painted freehand with short, thick lines in contrasting colors. Perfect for the insurgent on the go
descriptionZh: 给手头紧的玩家的一个廉价选择，法玛斯有效地填补了昂贵的步枪和杀伤力较低的微型冲锋枪之间的空缺。 这把武器的喷漆采用徒手绘制，线条短粗，对比色彩鲜明。 活跃叛乱者的称手武器
